meaning: 吉斯伯恩[新西兰北岛东岸港市](或译吉斯博恩)
examples: Meanwhile Robin Hood met with Guy of Gisborne, who had boasted that he would capture Robin Hood sooner or later.
The flats and hill country surrounding Gisborne provide many interesting and unique places to visit on day trips and picnics.
"Light volcanic ash fall can be anticipated downwind of Tongariro", it said, potentially affecting the Waikato, Hawkes Bay, Gisborne and Bay of Plenty areas.
